ipxact:component.ipxact:name: weft_axi_xbar

ipxact:moduleParameter.ipxact:name: SlvIdWidth
ipxact:moduleParameter.ipxact:description: Manager-side AXI id width. Subordinate-side id width must be SlvIdWidth + clog2(NoSlvPorts).

ipxact:moduleParameter.ipxact:name: NoRules
ipxact:moduleParameter.ipxact:description: Number of address-map rules in AddrMap.

ipxact:moduleParameter.ipxact:name: MaxTxns
ipxact:moduleParameter.ipxact:description: Max outstanding transactions per direction (demux counters + mux W-select FIFO depth).

ipxact:component.ipxact:description: Weft AXI4 crossbar: NoSlvPorts managers x NoMstPorts subordinates, built from weft_axi_demux, weft_axi_mux and weft_axi_err_slv (per-manager decode + demux, per-subordinate mux, per-manager error slave on decode miss). Top module weft_axi_xbar. Depends on weft:axi:weft_axi_common (weft_axi_pkg, weft_axi_typedef) and weft:common (weft_addr_decode, weft_rr_arbiter, weft_sync_fifo); those sibling rtl dirs are added as include dependencies. Type parameters (slv_req_t/slv_rsp_t/mst_req_t/mst_rsp_t) and the address map (AddrMap, array of xbar_rule_t) are set at elaboration; subordinate-side id width must be SlvIdWidth + clog2(NoSlvPorts). AXI bus interfaces (busInterface abstraction) are not yet declared and will be added with the shared AXI abstraction definition.
